text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(I need to sleep... But... the night sky this time of
year is so...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(I'll just stay here a little longer... before I go to
bed.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega ends up sleep-deprived because of
her stargazing.
